name: Coca Cola (Tm) Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and sugar into a large bowl.
2. Heat butter, cocoa, and Coca-Cola to boiling point.
3. Pour the hot mixture over the flour and sugar mixture and mix thoroughly.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well. The batter will be thin; marshmallows will rise to the top.
5. Bake at 350°F in a cake pan (2 inches x 12 inches x 14 inches) for 30 to 35 minutes.
Icing:
1. Pour the melted butter, cocoa, and Coca-Cola over the confectioners sugar and mix well.
2. Pour the icing over the warm cake.
3. Optional: Add one cup toasted chopped pecans to the icing first.
